questions.question: Describe the main difference in the structure of forest ecosystems compared to desert ecosystems. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on structural components such as vegetation and habitat types.

questions.question: What is the primary role of the wetlands ecosystem in the water cycle? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the processes of evaporation, condensation, and precipitation.

questions.question: Compare and contrast the habitats and species found in riverine ecosystems with those in oceanic ecosystems. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Elaborate on the physical characteristics, primary producers, and typical species found in each type of ecosystem.
